markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Pamela to the content generation workflow for three key clients.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Client Handover:** Pamela will start with Disern (26 articles/wk) and Yoko (6 articles/wk). Ademilade will propose moving Diligent (5 articles/wk) to another team member, as its pipeline requires extensive manual work.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [**Ramp-Up Plan:** To manage the high volume, Pamela's Disern workload will be halved for the first 1–2 weeks, with Ademilade covering the rest. The full 26-article/week load begins the week of Jan 12.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [**Workflow Differences:** Disern uses a highly automated Atlas pipeline, requiring minimal editing. Yoko's workflow is more manual, using Claude for outlines and a separate editorial checklist for revisions.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [**Initial Assignments:** Pamela will complete 5 articles this week: 3 Disern edits (from pre-generated drafts) and 2 Yoko articles (1 new, 1 "Enriched" refresh). Ademilade will provide detailed feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=3344.0)

## Topics

### Client Handover & Workload

  - [**Initial Plan:** Pamela was assigned Disern (26 articles/wk), Yoko (6 articles/wk), and Diligent (5 articles/wk).](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [**Proposed Change:** To ensure a smooth start, Ademilade will ask Pansa to reassign Diligent.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Diligent's pipeline is not yet effective for refreshes, requiring significant manual "massaging" of the output.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [**Revised Plan:** Pamela will manage Disern and Yoko.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
      - [**Disern:** Workload will be halved for the first 1–2 weeks, with Ademilade covering the remainder.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
      - [**Yoko:** Full workload starts immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)

### Disern Workflow (26 articles/wk)

  - [**Airtable (Content OS):** The central hub for all assignments.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**Key Statuses:** `Ready to Start` → `Article Generation` → `Ready for Staging` → `Published`.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
      - [**Crucial Step:** When moving an article to `Ready for Staging`, tag it as "New" or "Refresh" in the Airtable field. This tells the publisher (Sulaiman) whether to create a new file or update an existing one in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [**Atlas Pipeline (PSEO):** Highly automated, requiring minimal input.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
      - [**Process:** Enter topic → Run pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
      - [**Manual Checks:**](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
          - [**Internal Links:** Verify the agentic workflow links to correct Disern landing pages.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
          - [**Meta Data:** Copy generated meta title/description from Atlas to Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
          - **Images:** Select cover image from Atlas, then compress it to \<200 KB (e.g., via iLoveIMG) to prevent slow page loads. Upload the final image to Airtable.
  - [**Editing & Publishing:**](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=1968.0)
      - [**Editing:** Paste the final output into a Google Doc using "Paste from Markdown" to preserve formatting. Focus is on remedial edits (flow, language, adding external links).](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=1968.0)
      - [**Publishing:**](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=2424.0)
          - [Update Airtable status to `Ready for Staging`.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
          - [Notify publisher (Sulaiman) via the recurring Linear ticket for the week.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=2424.0)
          - [Post a summary in the internal Slack channel with the Linear ticket link.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=2493.0)
  - [**Looker Studio Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=2574.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Manually update the Looker dashboard every Monday to track performance of new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=2626.0)
      - [**Process:** Use the hard-coded "Looker tasks" prompt in Claude to auto-format published URLs and clusters for GA4 and GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=3016.0)

### Yoko Workflow (6 articles/wk)

  - [**Overview:** More manual and client-specific. Pamela must review the Yoko Operating Manual and associated Loom videos for full context.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=3702.0)
  - [**New Article Generation:**](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4030.0)
      - [**Outline:** Use Claude to create a detailed SEO outline from the Airtable assignment (title, keywords, pain points).](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4080.0)
      - [**Assignment Direction:** Ask Claude to convert the outline into an assignment direction, using an existing Yoko spec plan as a template.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4202.0)
      - [**Atlas Input:** Paste the assignment direction into the Atlas pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4284.0)
      - [**Outline Override:** In the Atlas brief, delete the auto-generated "Proposed content structure" and paste in the Claude-generated outline.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4304.0)
      - [**Editorial Checklist:** Run the Atlas output through the Yoko editorial checklist prompt in Claude for a revised draft.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4388.0)
      - [**Final Edits:** In a Google Doc, add external links (sourced from the manual), verify statistics, and format for readability.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4524.0)
  - [**"Enriched" Refreshes:**](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4817.0)
      - [**Process:** Create a new tab in the article's Google Sheet called "Enriched." Paste the original content and make revisions.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4864.0)
      - [**Changes:** Update titles, fix broken links, add 2–3 new internal links, add FAQs, and improve flow.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4817.0)
      - [**Summary:** Add a comment at the top detailing all changes made.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4942.0)
  - [**Staging & Looker:**](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4703.0)
      - [**Staging:** Pamela stages articles directly in the Prismic CMS (15-minute process per article).](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4703.0)
      - [**Looker:** The process is more complex than Disern's; Pamela must watch the Loom video in the operating manual before attempting.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=2574.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ademilade:**](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [Propose reassigning the Diligent account to Pansa.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - [Provide Pamela with the Yoko Operating Manual and Loom video links.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=3793.0)
      - [Review Pamela's first articles and provide detailed feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
  - [**Pamela:**](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=3344.0)
      - [**Disern (3 articles):** Review pre-generated drafts, edit, add images/metadata, and submit for review.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=3344.0)
      - [**Yoko (2 articles):**](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4030.0)
          - [**New:** Generate "Mastering Internal Engagements" from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4030.0)
          - [**Enriched:** Revise the "Understanding all these are new" article.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4817.0)
      - [Review the Yoko Operating Manual and Loom videos for staging and Looker updates.](https://fathom.video/share/3dDbUJXXZC9f_xHSDxTo-Jg1vowkcBFW?tab=summary&timestamp=4990.0)
